paper.title: Pullout behavior of inclined steel fiber in an ultra-high strength cementitious matrix
paper.authors: Yun Lee; Su-Tae Kang; Jin-Keun Kim
paper.material_system: fiber pullout in ultra-high-strength cementitious matrix
paper.notes: Pullout/bond paper provides matrix proportions but no compressive-strength result for the matrix in the packet.

evidence.evidence_text: Pullout/bond paper provides matrix proportions but no compressive-strength result for the matrix in the packet.
